changes.before: No warmth met them inside. Only the absence of killing wind.
changes.after: Inside, the killing wind was gone.

changes.before: The cast was ugly with haste, built to strike, not impress.
changes.after: The cast was ugly with haste, built to strike.

changes.before: Her gaze had gone back to the inland trail, to the place where the visible line in the snow matched the one only she could track.
changes.after: She had gone back to the inland trail, to the place where the visible line in the snow matched the one only she could track.

changes.before: A commander who no longer counted what the road cost the bodies behind him.
changes.after: A commander who no longer counted what it cost the bodies behind him.

changes.before: Her thumb worked along the seam of the flask, hunting a flaw that was not there.
changes.after: She worked her thumb along the seam of the flask, hunting a flaw that was not there.

changes.before: Northrend stripped a marching force down to pace, hunger, and the next place to put its feet.
changes.after: Cold, distance, and bad ground stripped a marching force down to pace, hunger, and the next place to put its feet.

changes.before: The pressure in the wards grew until it became instruction. Leave. Turn back.
changes.after: The pressure in the wards grew until it resolved into one instruction: leave. Turn back.
Muradin snapped his head toward her.
Muradin snapped his head toward her.

changes.before: Jaina looked into the brazier instead of at either of them.
Jaina blinked, startled. Then her mouth tightened with resolve, and she returned to the invisible work between one step and the next.
changes.after: Jaina blinked, startled. Then she returned to the invisible work between one step and the next.

changes.before: Dagny's mouth tightened in the place where approval and contempt met.
changes.after: Dagny's mouth tightened. Approval buried under contempt.

changes.before: That threshold had been crossed when Arthas pulled a killing shaft out of his own chest.
changes.after: Arthas had pulled a killing shaft out of his own chest.

changes.before: She took the truth hard and steadied.
changes.after: For one step her jaw locked. Then she steadied.

changes.before: She took the truth hard and steadied.
changes.after: For one step her jaw locked. Then she steadied.
